title: mimulus glabratus subsp. typicus
intro: Mimulus glabratus subsp. typicus, also known as the smooth monkey flower, is a plant species that belongs to the Phrymaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues. Mimulus glabratus subsp. typicus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
